# init()

**Initializer**

Creates a new random nonce.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Discussion

The default nonce is a 12-byte random nonce.

## Creating a nonce

- **init(data:)**: Creates a nonce from the given data.

items.description: Creates a nonce from the given data.
